01

About

Analytical and detail-oriented Mathematical Sciences graduate with hands-on experience in data analysis, machine learning, and programming using Python, R, and MATLAB.

Trained in Data Science with Python at the University of Cape Town, with a strong foundation in working with complex datasets, cleaning and validating data, and building predictive models. Through academic projects and four internships, I've developed proficiency across spreadsheets, data tools, and communicating insights clearly to diverse audiences.

Reliable, eager to learn, and motivated to contribute to a data team by uncovering meaningful insights, supporting performance tracking, and growing within a fast-paced environment.

06

Beyond the Data

I served as a Residence Student Assistant at Cape Peninsula University of Technology's Freedom Square 1 residence (2022–2024), providing mentorship and academic support to fellow students, managing welfare and conflict resolution, and acting as a liaison between students and university management — experience that strengthened my leadership, communication, and problem-solving abilities. I'm also an active soccer player and committed gym-goer, habits that have built the discipline and consistency I bring to high-pressure, deadline-driven work.
